query: Find 10 parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by distance to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending.

2.description: get 200-year flood zones filtered by municipality geometry

3.description: get parcels in Drammen larger than 5000 m²

5.description: get quick-clay hazard zones filtered by municipality geometry

6.description: find nearest quick-clay hazard zone for each parcel

7.description: calculate distance from each parcel to its nearest quick-clay hazard zone

8.description: collapse to one row per parcel with minimum distance to quick-clay hazard zone

9.description: sort parcels by distance to quick-clay hazard zone ascending, then by parcel ID ascending
